name: Economy
short: Global LWD$ economy with API access.
description: Provides global user LWD$ balances, claim rewards, an interactive server shop with buttons and inventory, owner-controlled balance management, economy logs, an internal cog API, and an optional token-protected HTTP API for other bots or external services.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: Economy loaded! Use `[p]eco daily`, `[p]eco weekly`, `[p]eco monthly`, `[p]eco annual`, `[p]eco work`, `[p]eco shop`, `[p]eco balance`, `[p]eco pay`, and owner-only `[p]eco admin` / `[p]eco api` commands.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, global LWD$ balances, claim timestamps, server shop items, inventory quantities, one-time redeem codes for in-game item fulfillment, code gift metadata, shop channel/message IDs, economy log channel IDs, and a capped transaction ledger containing user IDs, guild IDs, amounts, reasons, actor IDs, and timestamps.
